name.label: Name
name.hint: Used as identifier (lowercase, e.g. mobile, erp-v2)

detail.confirmDeleteDescription: You are about to permanently delete this system. Roles assigned to this system will lose their system reference. This action cannot be undone.

new.title: New External System
new.nameAlreadyUsed: A system with this name already exists

update.title: Edit External System
update.nameAlreadyUsed: A system with this name already exists

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: Use this key to authenticate requests from your external system. Send it in the X-Api-Key header.
apiKey.rotateHint: Rotating the key invalidates the previous one. Update your external system with the new key.
apiKey.confirmRotateDescription: The previous key will stop working immediately. You will need to update your external system with the new key.
